title: Fangoo Artificial Christmas Pine Garland Wreath with Red Berry Snowy Pine Needle Pinecones Spruce Eucalyptus Leaves Winter Greenery Garland for Christmas Fi Stairs Table Decorations (1.8M)
features: 🎄CHRISTMAS RED BERRY GARLAND:Christmas garland is decorated with 16 red berries and 48 artificial holly leaves.The artificial red berry christmas garland is appr. 1.8 M in length and 20cm in width. The classic red berry garland are beautiful and thick, making your decoration more charming and eye-catching.

🎄HANDCRAFTED & DURABLE:The main stem of this beautiful natural-looking garland and 64 red berries holly leaves accessories are handmade, which seem to be very well-stacked. Hang it as you like wrapped around the Christmas tree, along a mantelpiece, twist it around the bannisters of a staircase or made into a wreath hanging anywhere.

🎄HIGH QUALITY:The Christmas Garland is handmade of foam berry clusters, wire main stem and plastic holly sprigs,non-cracking, fading, reuse all the year, durable and vivid; It can be bent and stored at will, and it is also very simple and reusable. The Christmas garland can be shaped freely to meet any space of decorations.

🎄INDOOR & OUTDOOR USE:For indoor and covered outdoor use. These red berry garland decorations add elegance to any party, home, classroom, or office. Perfect for Christmas party, wedding, bedroom, garden, balcony, swing stand, shopping malls, mantels, doors, table centerpiece and covered front porch staircase and many other decorations.

🎄CHRISTMAS ATMOSPHERE CREATOR: These Christmas red berry garland can be displayed in different places. It is a good choice for decoration in mantelpiece, door, stairs, bookshelf and arch. You can use the Christmas tree holly berry garland to decorate Christmas tree, fireplace or wall, with LED lights, make your Christmas tree or other things more beautiful, while adding a highlight to your Christmas
description: Product description 🎄 Get into the spirit of Christmas! 1.8M Pine Christmas Garland Light up your New Year, A Festive Assortment of Wintry Vegetation: Blooming with festive style, this holiday garland features a beautiful blend of realistic pine needles which is a classic symbol of holiday merriment.this 1.8M Christmas Garland helps bring the color of the nature right into your home! 🎄 Features: 🎄total 1.8M long 16 Branches Red Berry -18cm 48 pieces Artificial holly leaves 🎄Material：Copper wire/silk/plastic Applications: 🎄Become Wreaths: Bent to anshape you want, Just link the ring with the hook in the bottom, you can easily change the garland into a Christmas wreaths. 🎄Christmas Decorations: The Christmas garland has many exquisite red berries, pine cones, They make this garland full of vitality and diversity. 🎄Staircase decoration:Just hang a few Christmas garland on the edge of the stairs. It will be more beautiful after turning on the lights 🎄Decorate the fireplace mantle:Christmas garland works best on fireplace mantel. Simply sit the garland down adds festive accents to the fireplace mantel. 🎄Beautify your porch:Front porch is the part of the home that invite guests inside.Draping this cordless Christmas garland above the front door along with the matching wreath will make your front door stand out from neighborhood.🎄Outdoor & Indoor Decoration: The garland is suitable for decorating the door, staircase, bookshelves, mental, roof, arch, Christmas tree and so on. Package Includes: 1.8M red berry Christmas Garland x 1 Tips: 🎄 Be careful with your hands, avoid scratching by wire! Safety Warning Please handle with care and use following the instructions provided to ensure safety. Keep away from sources of heat, such as open flames, and make sure any electrical components are used safely. Small pieces could pose a choking hazard for very young children. Please refer to the package leaflet for further safety information.
